hero.subtitle: Comprehensive logistics solutions for freight railway transport across Central and Southeastern Europe.

services_overview.title: Our Services
services_overview.subtitle: From first request to final delivery — complete logistics solutions in one place.

rail.title: Classic Rail Transport
rail.desc: Organisation and implementation of freight transport by rail through key European corridors.

intermodal.title: Intermodal Transport
intermodal.desc: Combination of rail and road transport for optimal routes and delivery costs.

dangerous.title: Dangerous Goods (RID)
dangerous.desc: Certified transport of dangerous goods according to the strictest safety standards.

special.title: Special Cargo
special.desc: Transport of heavy, oversized and non-standard cargo with special route planning.

customs.title: Customs & Documentation
customs.desc: Complete preparation of customs documentation and representation before customs authorities.

tracking.title: Track & Trace
tracking.desc: Real-time shipment tracking with full supply chain transparency.

about_teaser.title: 360° logistics partner
about_teaser.desc_1: Railway Circle is a modern logistics company specialising in freight railway transport. Our "closed loop" concept ensures continuous and efficient functioning of your supply chain.
about_teaser.desc_2: Experienced experts from Slovenia, Croatia and Serbia with over 15 years of knowledge in railway transport.

cta_section.title: Ready to optimise your logistics chain?
cta_section.subtitle: Contact us today and discover how we can transform your logistics challenges into competitive advantages.

about.hero_title: We transform logistics challenges into advantages
about.hero_subtitle: A modern logistics company specialising in freight railway transport with extensive experience across Europe.
about.story_p1: Railway Circle was founded with one mission: to transform logistics challenges into competitive advantages for our customers. Our company builds its offering on the concept of "closed loop" logistics — from the first request to final delivery.
about.story_p2: The core of the company consists of experienced experts from Slovenia, Croatia and Serbia who combine over 15 years of knowledge in railway transport. Our mission is clear: to provide customers with a transparent, reliable and efficient logistics experience.
about.value_reliability_desc: Precise route planning and adherence to the highest safety standards guarantee the safety of your shipment.
about.value_360_desc: From the first request to final delivery — complete logistics solutions without interruptions or bottlenecks.
about.value_sustainability_desc: Emphasis on reducing carbon footprint through route optimisation and modernisation of logistics processes.
about.value_digital_desc: Full digitalisation of processes with real-time access to key information via the Track & Trace system.
about.group_title: Part of a strong logistics group
about.group_desc: Railway Circle is part of a successful group of companies covering the entire logistics chain:
about.director_desc: Long-time manager of Slovenian Railways and experienced expert in railway logistics.

services.hero_subtitle: From classic rail transport to special logistics challenges — everything in one place.
services.cta_desc: Every logistics challenge is unique. Contact us for an offer tailored to your needs.

contact.hero_subtitle: Our team is available 24 hours a day for swift resolution of your logistics challenges.
